title: Surface Geodes
description: Surface Geodes adds mysterious crystal geodes across the surface of the world that can be broken with a Geode Hammer to obtain valuable crystals, shards, and decorative materials.
body:
# 📖 About
Surface Geodes is a vanilla-friendly exploration mod that adds crystal geodes, new resources, tools, decorative blocks, and structures to Minecraft.

Crystal geodes generate naturally across the world and can be broken using special hammers to obtain valuable crystals, shards, and crafting materials. These materials can be processed into Crystal Powder using the Geode Crusher and used to craft Crystal Dusted tools that are stronger than iron tools but weaker than diamond tools.

The mod also expands building possibilities with crystal-themed decorative blocks and structures that blend naturally into the Minecraft world.

# ✨ Features
- Surface Geodes that generate naturally across the world
- Frosted Geodes, Magma Geodes, and Water Geodes
- Hammer and Reinforced Hammer
- Geode Crusher for processing crystals into Crystal Powder
- Crystal Dusted tool set
- Crystal shards, crystals, powder, and dust
- Decorative crystal blocks and building materials
- Crystal-themed world structures
## _🧱 Blocks_
- Surface Geode
- Frosted Geode
- Magma Geode
- Water Geode
- Geode Crusher
- Crystal Block
- Geode Bricks
- Cracked Geode Bricks
- Polished Geode Tiles
- Stone Dust Block
## _🔨 Tools_
- Hammer
- Reinforced Hammer
- Crystal Dusted Sword
- Crystal Dusted Pickaxe
- Crystal Dusted Axe
- Crystal Dusted Shovel
- Crystal Dusted Hoe
## _💎 Items_
- Geode Shard
- Geode Crystal
- Crystal Powder
- Geode Dust

# 🎥 Screenshots
The screenshots below showcase the geodes, tools, decorative blocks, structures, and other features added by Surface Geodes.
